title: Ewoks (soundtrack)
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Ewok}} {{Soundtrack |image=[[File:Ewoks_battle_for_endor_STV81281.jpg]] |title=''Ewoks'' soundtrack |composer=[[Peter Bernstein]] |conductor= |performer= |producer= |director= |cover artist= |publisher=[[Wikipedia:Varése Sarabande|Varése Sarabande]]
Catalogue Number: STV 81281 |release date=[[December 8]], [[1986]] |media type=[[Wikipedia:LP|12" LP]] |run time= |discs= |tracks=14 |upc= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Ewoks''''' was the official soundtrack album to the films ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' ([[1984]]) and ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' ([[1985]]). The album was released on [[Wikipedia:LP (format)|LP]] by Varése Sarabande and [[Lucasfilm]] on [[December 8]], [[1986]]. Only about half an hour of music from the two films was presented due to LP capacity limitations. For ''Caravan of Courage'', the music was composed by [[Peter Bernstein]] and conducted by Harry Rabinowitz, whereas Bernstein both composed and conducted the score for ''The Battle for Endor''. Bernstein adapted "[[Parade of the Ewoks]]" from [[John Williams]]' original [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (soundtrack)|''Return of the Jedi'' soundtrack]]; The piece is briefly sampled in both films. Jeff Moss wrote the song "[[My Star]]" sung by [[Cindel Towani]] in ''Ewoks: The Battle For Endor''. This song was not on the official album and remains unreleased. ==Contents== *a. ''Caravan Of Courage'' score composed by Peter Bernstein and conducted by Harry Rabinowitz. *b. ''The Battle For Endor'' score composed and conducted by Peter Bernstein. ===Side one=== {|class="wikitable sortable" {{Prettytable}} |- bgcolor="#CCCCCC" ! No. !! Title !! Film !! Length |- |1 |"Trek" |a |1:53 |- |2 |"Intro/Main Title" |a/b |2:47 |- |3 |"Noa & Terak" |b |3:50 |- |4 |"Teek" |b |2:44 |- |5 |"Set Up/Terak's Theme" |b |3:09 |- |6 |"Noa's Ark" |b |2:09 |- |7 |"Izrina" |a |1:31 |} ===Side two=== {|class="wikitable sortable" {{Prettytable}} |- bgcolor="#CCCCCC" ! No. !! Title !! Film !! Length |- |1 |"Flying" |a |2:46 |- |2 |"Good Night, Bad Dreams" |b |3:11 |- |3 |"Poker Game" |b |2:15 |- |4 |"Pulga Chase" |a |2:40 |- |5 |"The House" |b |1:39 |- |6 |"Escape" |b |1:30 |- |7 |"Farewell" |b |3:46 |} ==Credits== {{Credits |crew= *Produced by Peter Bernstein and Richard KraftAlbum jacket *Executive producer: Tom Null *Orchestrations: Christopher Palmer *Special thanks: George Lucas, Tom Smith, Kathy Durning and Anita Gross *Mastering engineer: Michele Stone *Matrix: Ric Hancock & Jim Limbean *Production coordinator: Karen Stone *Manufactured at KM Records *Color separations: Computer Color Corporation *Printed at Stoughton Printing Co. }} ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=vault/collecting/news20091124.html|text=Happy 25th Ewok Adventure!}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{RWM}} {{Interlang |ka=ევოკები (საუნდტრეკი) }} [[Category:Film soundtracks]]
